category_sources: source_facts.description says Picat is a logic-based multi-paradigm programming language; official user guide describes logic, functional, constraint, and scripting features.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is picat; official site and user guide use Picat as the language name.
docs_sources: Official Picat download page links to PDF and HTML documentation; HTML user guide is hosted under picat-lang.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Picat download page distributes source tarballs but does not expose an official public source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Picat user guide describe the multi-paradigm language, interpreter, constraints, and scripting use.
